zh.lifeSummary: 當John Forrester Stephens 2nd Baron Stephens of Lewynesmede於1378年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾時，他的父親Richard Fitz Stephens Baron of Llewynsmede32歲，母親Audrey De Castell28歲。他於1400年與Margaret de Didbrok在英國格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1426年在他的家鄉享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Forrester Stephens 2nd Baron Stephens of Lewynesmede于1378年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾时，他的父亲Richard Fitz Stephens Baron of Llewynsmede32岁，母亲Audrey De Castell28岁。他于1400年与Margaret de Didbrok在英国格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1426年在他的家乡享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stephens
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Stevens
meanings: English (London), Flemish, Dutch, and North German: patronymic from the personal name Steven . The surname of Flemish origin is also found in the Walloon part of Belgium. In North America, the English form of the surname has also absorbed some like-sounding Jewish names and various other European cognates, e.g. Greek Stefanidis , Serbian Stevanović (see Stevanovic ), Slovenian and Slovak Štefanič (see Stefanic ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Forrester
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English forester ‘officer in charge of a forest or lord's hunting ground’ (Old French forestier, Anglo-Norman forester). See Forrest .

variants.name: Forrest
meanings: Mainly U.S.: transferred use of the surname, in origin a local name for someone who lived in or by an enclosed wood, Old French forest.

variants.name: Forester
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Forrester   (see   Forrest  ).

variants.name: Forrister
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Forrester  .

variants.name: Forster
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, an occupational name with at least four possible derivations: from Middle English foster ‘foster parent’, for(e)ster ‘forester’, fors(e)ter ‘shearer’, or fu(y)ster ‘saddle-tree maker’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Forrester Stephens 2nd Baron Stephens of Lewynesmede was born in 1378, in Gloucestershire, England, his father, Richard Fitz Stephens Baron of Llewynsmede, was 32 and his mother, Audrey De Castell, was 28. He married Margaret de Didbrok in 1400, in Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1426, in his hometown, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Forrester Stephens 2nd Baron Stephens of Lewynesmede est né en 1378, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Fitz Stephens Baron of Llewynsmede, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Audrey De Castell, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Didbrok en 1400, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1426, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Forrester Stephens 2nd Baron Stephens of Lewynesmede 1378 in Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Fitz Stephens Baron of Llewynsmede 32 und seine Mutter Audrey De Castell 28. Er hat 1400 in Gloucestershire, England Margaret de Didbrok geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1426 im Alter von 48 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Forrester Stephens 2nd Baron Stephens of Lewynesmede è nato il nel 1378 nel Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Richard Fitz Stephens Baron of Llewynsmede, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Audrey De Castell, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Didbrok nel 1400, nel Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1426, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Forrester Stephens 2nd Baron Stephens of Lewynesmedeが1378年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Richard Fitz Stephens Baron of Llewynsmedeは32歳，母Audrey De Castellは28歳であった。1400年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでMargaret de Didbrokと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1426年に故郷で48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Forrester Stephens 2nd Baron Stephens of Lewynesmede(이)가 1378년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Fitz Stephens Baron of Llewynsmede(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Audrey De Castell(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1400년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 Margaret de Didbrok(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1426년 그의 고향에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Forrester Stephens 2nd Baron Stephens of Lewynesmede nasceu em 1378, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Fitz Stephens Baron of Llewynsmede, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Audrey De Castell, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Didbrok em 1400, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1426, em sua cidade natal, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Forrester Stephens 2nd Baron Stephens of Lewynesmede родился в 1378 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Fitz Stephens Baron of Llewynsmede было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Audrey De Castell, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Didbrok в 1400 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1426 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Forrester Stephens 2nd Baron Stephens of Lewynesmede nació en 1378, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Fitz Stephens Baron of Llewynsmede, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Audrey De Castell, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Margaret de Didbrok en 1400, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1426, en su pueblo, a la edad de 48 años.
